acquisition method: characterising the GS phenotype in seawater-transferred rainbow trout using untargeted and targeted approaches.
cleavage agent: were reduced, alkylated, precipitated, trypsin digested and TMT labelled
collision energy: with a relative collision energy of 35%
fragmentation method: automatically fragmented using collision induced dissociation
instrument: Samples were analysed with an LTQ-Orbitrap XL LC − MSn mass spectrometer
labeling: were reduced, alkylated, precipitated, trypsin digested and TMT labelled
reduction reagent: Sodium dodecyl sulphate and dithiothreitol were added to the homogenates
reduction concentration: added to the homogenates to a final concentration of 4% and 0.1 M
